data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplify choices to improve user decision-making and interface speed.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Design click targets that are easy to interact with, especially on mobile devices.
data.technical_spec: Larger buttons for improved tap areas on mobile.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: A visually appealing design is perceived as easier to use.

data.title: Tesler’s Law
data.description: Complexity cannot be reduced beyond a certain point, so focus on increasing system efficiency.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users prefer interfaces similar to those they already know.
data.technical_spec: Adheres to common design patterns found in major streaming services.
